title: galphimia australis
intro: Galphimia australis, also known as Mexican gentian or Galphimia, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, as well as alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other digestive issues. Galphimia australis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
